page_metadata.bioconda__summary: We have developed a tool SOAPsplice for genome-wide ab initio detection of splice junction sites from RNA-Seq, a method using new generation sequencing technologies to sequence the messenger RNA.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: We have developed a tool soapsplice for genome-wide ab initio detection of splice junction sites from rna-seq, a method using new generation sequencing technologies to sequence the messenger rna.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Designed to use RNA-Seq reads for genome-wide ab initio detection of splice junction sites and identification of alternative splicing (AS) events.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Designed to use RNA-Seq reads for genome-wide ab initio detection of splice junction sites and identification of alternative splicing (AS) events.
